Event: Christmas Sorcery Festival
Event Date: 01/12/2022
Sage Bot Item Code: RI61


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
String Lights Ring

Once in a while, the unit shoots an icicle at the nearest enemy, dealing 80000 magic damage. Has a 75% chance to freeze the enemy. While frozen, they are unable to move or attack for 2,5 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities are increased by 2,5 sec. If the enemy is frozen, the unit shoots a second icicle at the nearest non-frozen enemy, dealing 80000 magic damage and freezing the target for 1,5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
